code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut best: Option<Int> = None
  while i < n
    # skip whitespace
    while i < n
      let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        -1
      end
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        i = i + 1
      else
        i = n + 1000
      end
    end
    if i <= n
      # end of line or no more
    end
    # reset break flag
    if i > n
      i = i - 1000
    else
      i = n
    end
    if i >= n
      i = n
    end
    # parse number
    mut sign = 1
    mut has = false
    let b0 = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      -1
    end
    if b0 == 45
      sign = -1
      i = i + 1
    else if b0 == 43
      i = i + 1
    end
    mut val = 0
    while i < n
      let bd = match string.byte_at(line, i)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        -1
      end
      if bd >= 48 and bd <= 57
        val = val * 10 + (bd - 48)
        i = i + 1
        has = true
      else
        i = n + 2000
      end
    end
    if i > n
      i = i - 2000
    end
    if has
      let signed = val * sign
      let abs_v = if signed < 0
        -signed
      else
        signed
      end
      match best
      when None
        best = Some(signed)
      when Some(cur)
        let cur_abs = if cur < 0
          -cur
        else
          cur
        end
        if abs_v < cur_abs
          best = Some(signed)
        end
      end
    end
  end
  match best
  when Some(v)
    println("min_abs=#{v}")
  when None
    println("min_abs=0")
  end
end
